dataset_name: Mini LED defect dataset - single RGB pixel v1
description: Each image contains only one RGB pixel composed of R/G/B subpixels. One random defect is generated within the RGB pixel.
label_format: YOLO: class_id x_center y_center width height, normalized to [0, 1]
mask_format: single-channel binary PNG; 255 indicates defect region
rules: Only one RGB pixel appears in each image.
Each RGB pixel consists of three subpixels: R, G, and B.
Each image contains exactly one defect.
Defect type is randomly selected from point, square, circle, line_h, line_v.
Defect location is randomly placed inside one of the R/G/B subpixels.
